notes: zoneExecutor : maps canonical zone IDs (a1/a2/a3/ls) to MA executor numbers — used by ma-control
UDP targets  : defined in the UDP Out nodes inside the Node-RED flow (not here)
owner gate   : global.ma_owner ('nodered' | 'watchout' | null); goExecutorCue requires 'nodered', goSequenceCue requires 'watchout'; null allows both
